name: Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Power Supply
title: Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Power Supply
title_extended: Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Power Supply - Power Supply for Doorbell
short_description: UniFi G4 Doorbell Power Supply, Cable Length 6 m, 2x Spade Wire Connectors
description: The Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Power Supply, is an optional accessory for the UVC-G4-Doorbell and UVC-G4-Doorbell Pro, designed to provide power without the need for existing electrical wiring. The cable length extends to 6 meters (approximately 19' 8"), ensuring flexibility in installation locations. The device itself is encased in a polycarbonate jacket, indicating durability and resistance to various environmental conditions. It operates efficiently within a temperature range of -10 to 40° C and can handle humidity levels from 0 to 95% noncondensing. Model comes with spade wire connectors for easy installation and are backed by certifications including CE, FCC, and IC, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards

detailed_description.heading: Power Supply for G4 Doorbell
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Power Supply is an optional accessory for the UVC-G4-Doorbell and UVC-G4-Doorbell Pro, designed to provide power without the need for existing electrical wiring.

detailed_description.heading: Cable Length and Durability
detailed_description.text: The cable length extends to 6 meters (approximately 19' 8"), ensuring flexibility in installation locations. The device itself is encased in a polycarbonate jacket, indicating durability and resistance to various environmental conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Specifications
detailed_description.text: Input: 220-240VAC, 50 Hz, 1A Max. Output: 20VAC, 0.7A. Cable length: 6 m (19' 8"). Two spade wire connectors.
